title: Descent Dimension
description: Datapack that adds a new, late game, looter-dungeon dimension.
body:
descent is a late-game looter-dungeon dimension meant to fill all your needs

cold, dark, and ominous

takes advantage of the systems added in the tricky trials update to offer a more exciting way to get netherite in the late game.

**requires server sided portals mod**

though i intend for you to learn how to get to descent through gameplay, i thought i'd leave some info on how to get to the dimension for those who are lost:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

to get to the descent dimension, first go to the nether as you cannot get there in the overworld. then, build a portal out of quartz blocks, and light it with flame. congratulations, you have made it to descent and can begin your journey

</details>
